title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 307.025 - Exemptions
text:
307.025.  Exemptions. — The subsequent provisions of this chapter with respect to equipment and lights on vehicles shall not apply to agricultural machinery and implements, road machinery, road rollers, traction engines, motorized bicycles, electric bicycles as defined in section 301.010, or farm tractors except as in this chapter made applicable.
(L. 1941 p. 438 § 8386b, A.L. 1980 H.B. 995 & 1051, A.L. 2021 S.B. 176)
